overview.description: The Invesco BulletShares 2035 Corporate Bond ETF (BSCZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated, investment grade corporate bonds with effective maturities in 2035. BSCZ was launched on Jun 11, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: Invesco BulletShares USD Corporate Bond 2035 Index
